name: EdwProvClmDiagAllSuplmtRunCycUpdt

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MAX(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'CLAIMSUPLMTDIAG' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND SRC_SYS_CD IN ('CLAYPLATTE','ENCOMPASS','JAYHAWK','LIBERTYHOSP','MERITAS','NORTHLAND','OLATHEMED','PROVSTLUKES','SUNFLOWER','UNTDMEDGRP','BARRYPOINTE','LEAWOODFMLYCARE','PRIMEMO','PROVIDENCE','SPIRA','MOSAICLIFECARE','HCA','NONSTDSUPLMTDATA','CHILDRENSMERCY','CENTRUSHEALTH','MOHEALTH','GOLDENVALLEY','JEFFERSON','WESTMOMEDCNTR','BLUESPRINGS','EXCELSIOR','HARRISONVILLE','TRUMAN, CHILDRENSMERCY','ASCENTIST') GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE t SET t.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC t JOIN cte ON t.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD AND t.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND t.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD WHERE t.RUN_CYC_NO <= cte.RUN_CYC_NO AND t.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N';

Description:

JOB NAME:  EdwProvClmDiagAllSuplmtRunCycUpdt
CALLED BY: EdwProvClmDiagAllSuplmCntl

DESCRIPTION:  This Job Updates EDW_LOAD_IN value to 'Y' in P_RUN_CYC table.

      
PROCESSING:
IDS - read from source, lookup all code SK values and get the natural codes

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for that one particular run cycle
JOB NAME:
EdwProvClmSuplmtDiagRunCycUpdt
DESCRIPTION:  This Job Updates EDW_LOAD_IN value to 'Y' in the P_RUN_CYC table, to indicate the records that go with that run cycle have been updated in the EDW.
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS CLM_SUPLMT_DIAG with a value "N" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN
buffer
